description:
Generalize the tag-up loop at ir_codegen.rs:2182-2197 (currently unconditionally boxes raw vars used by the terminator) to a coerce pass keyed on the receiver's expected repr per slot:
  - Return: this fn's return AbiParam type
  - TailCall: callee sig's per-arg AbiParam types
  - Call: callee sig's per-arg AbiParam types (cont-result repr stays tagged into any-key cont)
  - Goto: keep block_param at tagged i64 (chosen for elegance over per-pred re-type negotiation)
  - Halt: tagged i64 (runtime fz_halt sig unchanged)

Unified helper: given Var, current repr, target AbiParam type → emit tag/untag and return new ir::Value. Replaces duplicate logic at terminator and call-site arg forwarding.
title: VR.4 follow-up STEP.3: Terminator-coerce pass
